description: Schema and fixture corpus for recording exact validation frontiers when broad proof commands stop in unrelated blockers.

decision_classes.meaning: The intended proof command completed and is the primary validation claim.
The intended proof command or commit path stopped in an unrelated external blocker; cite the blocker and the narrower supplemental proof.
The intended proof command stopped in a blocker caused by the owned slice itself.

error_classes.ownership_expectation: Use only for pass rows whose required proof lane actually ran and exited successfully.
Route to the file owner or local bead when the touched slice caused the compile stop.
Treat unrelated lint debt as an external blocker unless the touched slice introduced it.
Treat as external coordination blocker; cite the holding agent and expiry.
Treat as external shared-main blocker; cite the staged peer paths before committing.
Treat as external environment blocker when RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 refuses local fallback before the proof lane runs.
Treat as local when the diff overlaps the owned reservation scope; otherwise cite the dirty formatter frontier.

error_classes.surface: cargo check or cargo test output capture
error_classes.ownership_expectation: Preserve the first exact rustc blocker and mark the lane truncated so agents do not infer a complete diagnostic inventory.

record_fields.name: command
record_fields.description: The intended proof or coordination command that was attempted.

record_fields.name: proof_lane_id
record_fields.description: Stable proof lane identifier, such as production-lib-check, lib-test, all-targets-check, clippy, rustdoc, rustfmt, or rch-admission.

record_fields.name: commit
record_fields.description: Repository commit that the attempt targeted.

record_fields.name: timestamp
record_fields.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for the attempt.

record_fields.name: touched_files
record_fields.description: Owned files that motivated the validation attempt.

record_fields.name: dirty_tree_summary
record_fields.description: Tracked modified, deleted, untracked, and overlap state for the shared-main checkout at attempt time.

record_fields.name: rch_result.admission
record_fields.description: RCH worker admission result: remote-executed, remote-refused, local-fallback-refused, or not-applicable.

record_fields.name: rch_result.worker
record_fields.description: Remote worker that ran the lane when admitted.

record_fields.name: rch_result.local_fallback_refused
record_fields.description: Whether RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 refused to fall back locally.

record_fields.name: exit_status
record_fields.description: Process exit status for the proof lane or coordination command.

record_fields.name: decision
record_fields.description: How the result should be cited in a close reason.

record_fields.name: error_class
record_fields.description: Normalized blocker classification.

record_fields.name: first_blocker
record_fields.description: First exact blocker for blocked or failed lanes; null only for pass rows.

record_fields.name: first_failure.crate_or_surface
record_fields.description: The first crate or coordination surface that stopped the attempt.

record_fields.name: first_failure.target
record_fields.description: The first failing cargo target or coordination target.

record_fields.name: first_failure.file
record_fields.description: The first failing file or path.

record_fields.name: first_failure.line
record_fields.description: Line number for code blockers; 0 for coordination-only blockers.

record_fields.name: error_buckets
record_fields.description: Diagnostics grouped by file, module, stable error code or lint, and ownership hint.

record_fields.name: affected_files
record_fields.description: Files implicated by the proof output, distinct from the files intentionally touched.

record_fields.name: likely_owner
record_fields.description: Best current ownership hint, including 'local_change' or external agent names.

record_fields.name: likely_bead
record_fields.description: Best current bead hint when known.

record_fields.name: blocker_origin
record_fields.description: Best-effort recent git commit metadata for the first blocker path, including commit, subject, author, and parsed bead id when available.

record_fields.name: external_to_narrow_fuzz_target_work
record_fields.description: Whether the blocker is outside the owned narrow fuzz-target or artifact slice and should be cited as external frontier debt.

record_fields.name: green_proof_claimed
record_fields.description: Whether this row is allowed to feed a green Beads or Agent Mail proof claim.

record_fields.name: supplemental_proof_command
record_fields.description: The narrower proof that still covered the local change.

record_fields.name: summary
record_fields.description: Short blocker summary that can be pasted directly into a close reason.

close_reason_template.example: blocked-external: intended `rch exec -- cargo test --test combinator_select_fairness_determinism_audit -- --nocapture`; stopped at `src/sync/semaphore.rs:37` (`rustc_compile_error`, unused imports) while touching `tests/combinator_select_fairness_determinism_audit.rs`; supplemental proof `rch exec -- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check tests/combinator_select_fairness_determinism_audit.rs`.

redaction_rules: Do not include home-directory paths or bearer tokens.
Prefer repo-relative file paths and exact rustc/clippy error summaries.
Record local fallback markers explicitly instead of hiding them.
